queries.query: Create reference documentation for these workspace API endpoints.
Document the CLI options for acme deploy in a lookup table.
Turn this partial config schema into reference documentation with defaults, valid values, and unknown fields labeled.
Make a reference page for our sync error codes.
Can you write a parameter reference for this webhook payload schema?
List the system limits and compatibility matrix for the connector, marking compatibility boundaries that the source does not specify.
Write step-by-step setup docs for the CLI.
Explain why workspaces exist and how they fit our architecture.
Draft a proposal to fund a full API documentation rewrite.
Compare three schema designs and recommend the best one.
Make this endpoint announcement engaging for developers.
Write a troubleshooting runbook for error 1002.
